title: carduus lusitanicus subsp. broteroi
intro: Carduus lusitanicus subsp. broteroi, also known as the Portuguese thistle, is a plant species within the thistle family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carduus lusitanicus subsp. broteroi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or used in topical applications.
